markdown:
<title level="1" right="Warfare Tactic 8" pfs="">[Ambush](/KMWarTactics.aspx?ID=1)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 575

Your skirmishers are experts at ambushing. On the first round of a war encounter, if your turn occurs before any enemy army turns, you can choose to start the encounter with your army already [engaged](/Conditions.aspx?ID=48) with an enemy army whose initiative result is lower than yours. If you do so, your army gains a +2 status bonus on the first Attack war action they make against that army on the first round of the encounter.
name: Ambush

</additional-info>

If you do so, your army gains a +2 status bonus on the first Attack war action they make against that army on the first round of the encounter.

<title level="1" right="Warfare Tactic 3" pfs="">[Focused Devotion](/KMWarTactics.aspx?ID=10)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Cavalry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=458" />
<trait label="Infantry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=455" />
<trait label="Siege" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=457" />
<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 576

The army is particularly loyal to your cause. The army gains a +1 status bonus on Morale checks made to Rally. This bonus increases to +2 at 9th level, and +3 at 17th level. The army can use the Taunt tactical war action.
name: Focused Devotion

<traits>
<trait label="Cavalry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=458" />
<trait label="Infantry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=455" />
<trait label="Siege" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=457" />
<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 576

The army has trained to maintain position even in the face of overwhelming opponents. The army gains a +1 status bonus on Morale checks made to resist rout, and its Rout Threshold is equal to 1/4 it's total Hit Points (rounded up).
name: Hold the Line

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Warfare Tactic 3" pfs="">[Keep up the Pressure](/KMWarTactics.aspx?ID=14)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Cavalry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=458" />
<trait label="Infantry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=455" />
<trait label="Siege" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=457" />
<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 576

The commander's swift, decisive directions help the army attack more accurately. If an army attacks the same target a second time in a round, its multiple attack penalty is –4 rather than –5, and if they attack that same army a third time in a round, its multiple attack penalty is –8 rather than –10.
name: Keep up the Pressure

<title level="1" right="Warfare Tactic 1" pfs="">[Live off the Land](/KMWarTactics.aspx?ID=15)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Cavalry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=458" />
<trait label="Infantry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=455" />
<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 576

The army is trained to be self-sufficient and sustains itself via hunting and gathering when they're in the wild. If during a Kingdom turn's Upkeep phase this army is located in a hex that doesn't include a settlement, and if the army is not garrisoned, it reduces its Consumption by 1.
name: Live off the Land

<trait label="Infantry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=455" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 576

This army is difficult to escape from. The army's Mobility DC gains a +2 status bonus when other armies attempt Mobility checks against it while attempting to Disengage. This army can use the All-Out Assault tactical war action.

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Warfare Tactic 5" pfs="">[Reckless Flankers](/KMWarTactics.aspx?ID=19)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Cavalry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=458" />
<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 576

Your army is skilled at surrounding their foes and distracting them, at the cost of spreading out too much and being more vulnerable. When you use the Advance war action to successfully [engage](/Conditions.aspx?ID=48) an army, you can choose to take a –2 circumstance penalty to your AC in order to gain a +1 circumstance bonus on attack rolls. If you do so, these modifiers remain in effect until you are no longer engaged. You can use the Outflank tactical war action.
name: Reckless Flankers

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Warfare Tactic 5" pfs="">[Bloodied but Unbroken](/KMWarTactics.aspx?ID=2)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Cavalry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=458" />
<trait label="Infantry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=455" />
<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 575

The army is at its greatest during the most desperate times. When the army's hit points are at or below its Rout Threshold, it gains a +1 status bonus to its AC, Mobility, Morale, and attack rolls. At 10th level or higher, this bonus increases to +2.
name: Bloodied but Unbroken

<title level="1" right="Warfare Tactic 5" pfs="">[Sharpshooter](/KMWarTactics.aspx?ID=20)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Cavalry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=458" />
<trait label="Infantry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=455" />
<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 576

The commander drills the army in precision ranged attacks. You gain a +1 status bonus on attacks with ranged Strikes, but suffer a –2 status bonus on attacks with melee Strikes. At 9th level, the penalty to melee Strikes is reduced to –1, and at 15th level the penalty to melee Strikes is removed. The army can use the Covering Fire tactical war action.
name: Sharpshooter

<trait label="Infantry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=455" />
<trait label="Siege" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=457" />
<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 575

The army includes several spotters and scouts who have [darkvision](/Rules.aspx?ID=415), and the rest of the soldiers have been trained to follow their lead so that the army itself functions as if it had darkvision.
name: Darkvision

<title level="1" right="Warfare Tactic 3" pfs="">[Defensive Tactics](/KMWarTactics.aspx?ID=5)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Cavalry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=458" />
<trait label="Infantry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=455" />
<trait label="Siege" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=457" />
<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 575

The army is especially good at enacting defensive tactics. The army gains a +1 status bonus on Maneuver checks made to Guard. This bonus increases to +2 at 9th level, and +3 at 17th level. The army can use the Defensive Stance tactical war action.
name: Defensive Tactics

<title level="1" right="Warfare Tactic 11" pfs="">[Explosive Shot](/KMWarTactics.aspx?ID=6)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Siege" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=457" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 575

The army's ranged attacks explode and spray fire, shrapnel, or other damaging material in every direction. Whenever the army critically hits a non-[distant](/Conditions.aspx?ID=52) army with a ranged Strike, inflict 1 point of additional damage to another non-distant enemy army of your choice. You can use the Overwhelming Bombardment tactical war action with the army
name: Explosive Shot

<title level="1" right="Warfare Tactic 9" pfs="">[Flaming Shot](/KMWarTactics.aspx?ID=8)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Cavalry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=458" />
<trait label="Infantry" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=455" />
<trait label="Siege" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=457" />
<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 576

The army attacks with projectiles treated with alchemical or magical oils that ignite as they are fired. When your army succeeds at a ranged Strike, the target army must attempt a Maneuver check against your army's attack DC; if it fails, the Strike inflicts 1 additional point of damage.
name: Flaming Shot

<traits>

<trait label="Skirmisher" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=456" />
</traits>

**Source** [Kingmaker Adventure Path](/Sources.aspx?ID=150) pg. 576

The army uses unconventional tactics. You can use the Dirty Fighting, False Retreat, and Feint tactical war actions, and the Counterattack tactical reaction with the army.
name: Flexible Tactics
